query:
SELECT p.id as player_id, p.phone, p.nickname,
       pi.id as item_id, pi.item_name, pi.status, pi.source, pi.created_at
FROM players p
LEFT JOIN player_items pi ON pi.player_id = p.id
WHERE p.phone = '18526239983'
ORDER BY pi.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
